description: Cornerstone OnDemand learning management system with training records, compliance tracking, attrition risk analytics, and integrated enterprise risk management
title: Cornerstone Learning & Risk Management System

tables.name: Activity_csod
tables.description: Learning activities and courses catalog with compliance, certification, and training details

tables.name: Transcript_csod
tables.description: Employee learning records including completion status, scores, and training progress

tables.name: User_csod
tables.description: User profiles and organizational structure for learning management

tables.name: AttritionRisk_Silver
tables.description: Daily time-series employee attrition risk assessments tracking flight risk, engagement trends, and retention priorities

tables.name: AttritionRisk_Daily
tables.description: Daily aggregated organizational attrition risk metrics for executive dashboards and trend analysis

tables.name: ComplianceRisk_Silver
tables.description: Daily time-series compliance training risk assessments tracking completion likelihood and intervention triggers

tables.name: ComplianceRisk_Daily
tables.description: Daily aggregated organizational compliance risk metrics with overdue tracking and completion rates

tables.name: ComplianceRisk_Activity
tables.description: Activity-level compliance risk aggregations for content effectiveness and vendor evaluation

tables.name: ComplianceRisk_Division
tables.description: Division-level compliance risk metrics for organizational benchmarking and accountability

tables.name: ComplianceRisk_Monthly
tables.description: Monthly aggregated compliance risk for executive reporting and strategic planning

tables.name: EnterpriseRisk_Combined
tables.description: Integrated employee-level risk profiles combining compliance and attrition risk for holistic HR strategy

knowledge_base.name: cornerstone_learning_knowledge_base
knowledge_base.description: Knowledge base for Cornerstone Learning Management System with training analytics and compliance insights

examples.name: cornerstone_learning_examples
examples.description: Example SQL queries and analytics for Cornerstone Learning data
